scored_hypotheses.claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a single, coherent narrative.

test_result.details: The 0.701 hapax ratio (70% unique words appearing only once) contradicts narrative coherence, as single narratives exhibit thematic repetition; despite Zipf-like distribution suggesting structure, the sparse vocabulary reuse indicates disparate topics rather than unified narrative.
